title: Riemann's Curvature

visual_sequence.observation: A small parallelogram loop measures tensorial curvature.
Two-plane choices probe the Riemann tensor.
Extrinsic, intrinsic, and covariant definitions are compared.
Changing the order of tiny moves exposes curvature.
Ricci curvature records volume and area acceleration.
